title: atropis angustata
intro: Atropis angustata, also known as the narrow-leaved atropis, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family. It is a perennial plant native to East Asia, with medicinal properties derived from its roots and rhizomes. The medicinal properties of Atropis angustata include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and potentially treating respiratory issues. Atropis angustata can be prepared into herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and decoctions, often used in traditional medicine in East Asia.
